Name: Shadows
Description: Controls shadow rendering parameters including cascaded shadow maps, filtering, depth biasing, blur, and cascade distribution for directional and local light shadowing.

Fields.Name: Angle
Fields.Description: Direction of the shadow-casting light, typically used for directional shadow alignment and orientation.

Fields.Name: Shadow Light Id
Fields.Description: Identifier for the light source that contributes to shadow rendering in this configuration.

Fields.Name: Near Clip Distance
Fields.Description: Near clipping distance for shadow rendering, defining the closest range where shadows are calculated.

Fields.Name: Cascade Distance: 0 -> 1
Fields.Description: Distance threshold defining transition from the first to the second shadow cascade.

Fields.Name: Cascade Distance: 1 -> 2
Fields.Description: Distance threshold defining transition from the second to the third shadow cascade.

Fields.Name: Cascade Distance: 2 -> 3
Fields.Description: Distance threshold defining transition into the fourth shadow cascade.

Fields.Name: Far Fade Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which shadow fading begins to reduce distant shadow visibility.

Fields.Name: Far Fade Distance
Fields.Description: Distance over which far shadows fully fade out.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map Filter Mode
Fields.Description: Filtering mode used for sampling shadow maps (e.g., PCF, linear filtering).

Fields.Name: Depth Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets shadow depth values to reduce surface self-shadowing artifacts (shadow spots).

Fields.Name: Volume Depth
Fields.Description: Controls volumetric shadow depth influence for participating media or soft shadow volumes.

Fields.Name: Depth Smooth Compare
Fields.Description: Applies smoothing to depth comparisons during shadow testing to reduce aliasing and hard shadow edges.

Fields.Name: Shadow Model Cull Flip
Fields.Description: Flips face-culling behavior for shadow rendering, useful for correcting inverted geometry or coordinate systems.

Fields.Name: Align Texel
Fields.Description: Aligns shadow projection to texel grid to reduce shimmering and crawling artifacts.

Fields.Name: Depth Rate
Fields.Description: Controls scaling of depth sensitivity in shadow computations, affecting precision distribution.

Fields.Name: Depth Scale
Fields.Description: Global multiplier for shadow depth values, adjusting overall shadow range compression or expansion.

Fields.Name: Kernel Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the filtering kernel size used in soft shadow blurring.

Fields.Name: Depth Offset Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to depth offset to fine-tune shadow biasing strength.

Fields.Name: Blur Count
Fields.Description: Number of blur passes applied to soften shadow edges.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of the shadow blur filter, controlling softness of shadow edges.

Fields.Name: Directional Shadow Color
Fields.Description: Defines the tint or color applied to directional light shadows, allowing stylized or softened shadow appearance.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map Resolution
Fields.Description: Base resolution of the shadow map texture used for rendering shadows.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map Filter Mode
Fields.Description: Filtering mode used for sampling shadow maps (e.g., PCF, linear filtering).

Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Depth Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets shadow depth values to reduce surface self-shadowing artifacts (shadow spots).

Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Calibrate Far Rate
Fields.Description: Adjusts how far-depth values are distributed in perspective shadow mapping to improve precision at long distances.

Fields.Name: Perspective Shadow Mapping: Gradient Factor
Fields.Description: Controls the gradient scaling of depth values in perspective shadow mapping, affecting shadow distribution and precision.

Fields.Name: Shadow Light ID
Fields.Description: Specifies which light source index is used for shadow casting when multiple lights are present.
